## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python main.py ...`
2. Wait for cycle to complete
3. See error in logs

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Logs

```
Paste relevant log output here (redact any API keys or personal data)
```

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12.1]
- Trade mode: [safe/normal/aggressive]
- Portfolio: [main/penny/both]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
